assertions.title: Ready items open into the studio's two-pane workspace

steps.action: Navigate to /items/item_6166501d398916df651d52ff
steps.expected: Studio page with two-pane layout loads
steps.observed: Studio page loaded with left 'Source Reference' panel and right platform workspace panel

steps.action: Verify page structure via snapshot
steps.expected: Left panel with source info, right panel with platform tabs and draft fields
steps.observed: Left: Source Reference (Video Preview, Metadata, Engagement, Transcript, Source Context). Right: Tab strip (XiaoHongShu, Bilibili, Video Channel, WeChat OA, X) with draft fields and checklist

steps.action: Verify GET /api/items/item_6166501d398916df651d52ff
steps.expected: 200 response with item data
steps.observed: 200 response with full item data including source, platformDrafts, artifacts, otherReadyItems

assertions.title: The left panel exposes prepared source references needed for manual replication

steps.action: Inspect left panel content via full snapshot
steps.expected: Video preview, metadata, transcript, source context visible
steps.observed: Left panel contains: Video Preview (path to video.mp4), Metadata (Title: '旅行Vlog | 周末短途游', Author: 'Coffee Master', Published: '3/15/2026', Duration: '4:00', Source URL: douyin link), Engagement (Likes: 312,000, Comments: 12,000, Shares: 3,400), Transcript (path to transcript.txt), Source Context (Score: 93, Recommended: Yes)

steps.action: Verify source URL link is clickable
steps.expected: Source URL is a link
steps.observed: Source URL rendered as clickable link to https://www.douyin.com/video/7234567890123456794

steps.action: Verify Back to Preparation button present
steps.expected: Operator action to navigate back
steps.observed: 'Back to Preparation' button present in header

assertions.title: XiaoHongShu is the default active tab and all V1 tabs are available

steps.action: Check default active tab on fresh page load
steps.expected: XiaoHongShu tab active, heading shows 'XiaoHongShu Draft'
steps.observed: XiaoHongShu tab is highlighted (blue underline), heading shows 'XiaoHongShu Draft' with subtitle 'Little Red Book'

steps.action: Verify all V1 tabs present in tab strip
steps.expected: XiaoHongShu, Bilibili, Video Channel, WeChat OA, X
steps.observed: All 5 tabs present: buttons labeled 'XiaoHongShu', 'Bilibili', 'Video Channel', 'WeChat OA', 'X'

assertions.title: Each platform tab provides editable draft fields

steps.action: Fill XiaoHongShu draft fields (Title, Caption, Cover Notes)
steps.expected: Fields accept text input
steps.observed: Successfully filled Title='XHS Test Title', Caption='XHS Test Caption Content', Cover Notes='XHS Cover Notes'

steps.action: Switch to Bilibili tab and fill draft fields
steps.expected: Bilibili tab has editable fields
steps.observed: Successfully filled Title='Bilibili Test Title', Description='Bilibili Test Description', Cover Notes='Bilibili Cover Notes'

steps.action: Switch to Video Channel tab and fill draft fields
steps.expected: Video Channel tab has editable fields
steps.observed: Successfully filled Title='VC Manual Title', Description='VC Manual Description', Cover Notes='VC Manual Cover Notes'

steps.action: Switch to WeChat OA tab and fill draft fields
steps.expected: WeChat OA tab has editable fields
steps.observed: Successfully filled Title='WeChat OA Title', Content='WeChat OA Content'

steps.action: Switch to X tab and verify fields
steps.expected: X tab has platform-specific editable fields
steps.observed: X tab shows platform-specific 'Tweet Text' field instead of 'Caption / Description'. Successfully filled Title='X Post Title', Tweet Text='X Post Tweet Content'

assertions.title: Checklist state is tracked independently per platform

steps.action: Check 'Cover uploaded' and 'Tags added' on Bilibili tab, save draft
steps.expected: Checkboxes check successfully
steps.observed: Both checkboxes checked and draft saved via POST /api/items/item_6166501d398916df651d52ff/drafts

steps.action: Switch to XiaoHongShu tab and verify checklist state
steps.expected: XiaoHongShu checklist remains unchecked (independent)
steps.observed: All 3 XiaoHongShu checkboxes (Cover uploaded, Tags added, Ready to publish) are unchecked — Bilibili's checked state did not leak

steps.action: Verify via API that platforms have independent checklist data
steps.expected: Different checklist states per platform in API response
steps.observed: API confirms: bilibili has coverUploaded=true, tagsAdded=true; xiaohongshu has all false; video-channel has all true

assertions.title: Draft edits and checklist state persist across tab switches and reload

steps.action: Save XiaoHongShu draft with title and caption, save Bilibili draft with title, description, and checked checkboxes
steps.expected: Drafts saved successfully
steps.observed: Both saves returned success via Save Draft button

steps.action: Reload the page
steps.expected: Saved values restored from persistence
steps.observed: After reload: XiaoHongShu title='XHS Test Title', caption='XHS Test Caption Content', cover notes='XHS Cover Notes', all checkboxes unchecked. Bilibili title='Bilibili Test Title', description='Bilibili Test Description', checkboxes Cover uploaded=checked, Tags added=checked, Ready to publish=unchecked.

steps.action: Verify cross-platform isolation after reload
steps.expected: Each platform shows its own saved state
steps.observed: XiaoHongShu and Bilibili both restored their independent states after reload without cross-contamination

assertions.title: Manual editing remains available when generated content is sparse or empty

steps.action: Navigate to Video Channel tab (empty/no generated content)
steps.expected: All draft fields are empty but editable
steps.observed: Title, Caption/Description, Cover/Visual Notes fields all empty with placeholder text, all fully editable

steps.action: Fill in manual content and click Save Draft
steps.expected: Manual content saved without errors
steps.observed: Successfully filled Title='VC Manual Title', Description='VC Manual Description', Cover Notes='VC Manual Cover Notes' and saved. API returned {success:true}

steps.action: Verify saved content persists
steps.expected: Manual content persisted in API
steps.observed: API response shows video-channel platformDraft with title='VC Manual Title', body='VC Manual Description', coverNotes='VC Manual Cover Notes'

assertions.title: Manual completion remains available even if generation quality is poor

steps.action: On Video Channel tab (no generated content), check all 3 checklist items
steps.expected: All checkboxes can be checked despite no generated suggestions
steps.observed: Successfully checked 'Cover uploaded', 'Tags added', 'Ready to publish' — all 3 show blue checkmarks

steps.action: Save draft with completed checklist
steps.expected: Save succeeds with all checklist items marked
steps.observed: Save Draft completed successfully. API confirms all 3 checklist items true for video-channel

assertions.title: One platform tab failure does not block the others

steps.action: Edit and save drafts on all 5 platform tabs independently
steps.expected: Each tab saves independently without affecting others
steps.observed: Successfully saved distinct content on all 5 platforms: XiaoHongShu, Bilibili, Video Channel, WeChat OA, X — each with unique titles and content

steps.action: Verify cross-tab isolation after multiple saves
steps.expected: Each platform retains its own data after saves on other tabs
steps.observed: Switching between tabs after saves showed each platform retaining its own title, body, coverNotes, and checklist state. API response confirmed 5 independent platformDrafts with correct per-platform data and different lastUpdated timestamps

steps.action: Verify save endpoint is platform-scoped
steps.expected: POST /api/items/{id}/drafts accepts platform parameter and scopes save
steps.observed: API confirms platform-scoped saves: each POST includes platform field, and each platform's draft data is stored independently with its own lastUpdated timestamp

evidence.network: POST /api/items/item_6166501d398916df651d52ff/drafts -> 200 (5 independent platform-scoped saves confirmed via API)

assertions.issues: Note: Could not simulate a network failure for a specific platform save in this test environment. Verified isolation by confirming that saves on one platform do not overwrite data on other platforms, and that all 5 tabs remain independently functional after multiple saves.

assertions.title: Studio exposes lightweight next-step affordances when applicable

steps.action: Verify 'Next Platform →' and 'Next Ready Video →' buttons are visible
steps.expected: Both navigation affordances present on studio page
steps.observed: Both buttons visible below the checklist: 'Next Platform →' and 'Next Ready Video →'

steps.action: Click 'Next Platform →' from XiaoHongShu tab
steps.expected: Navigates to next platform tab (Bilibili)
steps.observed: Tab switched to Bilibili — verified by checking title field value = 'Bilibili Test Title' and checklist state matching Bilibili's saved state

steps.action: Click 'Next Ready Video →'
steps.expected: Navigates to second ready item's studio page
steps.observed: URL changed to /items/item_719556b18b3b6d3ed7b3ce06. New studio page loaded for '新品开箱｜这款相机太惊艳了！' with fresh empty platform drafts

steps.action: Navigate back to first item and verify saved state preserved
steps.expected: First item's drafts not lost after navigating away
steps.observed: Navigated back to /items/item_6166501d398916df651d52ff — saved drafts for all platforms still present in API response

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 10 passed, 0 failed. All studio features working as specified — two-pane layout, source references, platform tabs with independent drafts and checklists, persistence across reload and navigation, manual editing with sparse content, and next-step affordances.
